headline: P&L exposure: ₹550 Cr direct legal exposure (engine estimate) + ₹379.5 Cr indirect regulatory and reputational impact (engine estimate) (of ₹929.5 Cr canonical event exposure)
what_matters: P/E compression of 0.2-0.5x expected due to reputational and regulatory overhang; margin erosion of 208.3 bps; revenue at risk: -₹68.8 Cr (engine estimate).
Cost of capital could rise by 20-40 bps as per BRSR/SEBI triggers, with potential for bond spread widening and foreign institutional investor outflows.

BRSR: non-disclosure, SEBI scrutiny; GRI:205 (rationale: Triggered by any fraud disclosure, bribery allegation, insider trading investigation, or ED/CBI action. Also referenced for ISO 37001 certification.)/207; COSO ERM; ESRS G1; regulatory deadlines for disclosure and remediation; potential penalties up to ₹550 Cr (from article).
action: Quantify exposure: ₹550 Cr direct legal exposure (engine estimate) + ₹379.5 Cr indirect regulatory and reputational impact (engine estimate) (of ₹929.5 Cr canonical event exposure)
Revenue at risk: ₹68.8 Cr indirect revenue impact (engine estimate)
